Built for specialist subcontractors
✦ AI‑Powered · Built for Commercial Subcontracting

Turn any enquiry pack into a
priced quote in 3 minutes.

CONTRAQ reads your PDF specs, extracts scope and quantities, and builds a structured quote — ready to send. Then manages every project, invoice, and cert until you get paid.

✓ No spreadsheets ✓ No manual data entry ✓ Works with any PDF enquiry pack
Used on projects managed by: │ Balfour Beatty │ Mace Group │ Skanska │ Morgan Sindall
Our users work alongside
BALFOUR BEATTY MORGAN SINDALL MACE GROUP SKANSKA KIER GROUP VINCI MULTIPLEX ISG LTD BAM NUTTALL BOUYGUES BALFOUR BEATTY MORGAN SINDALL MACE GROUP SKANSKA KIER GROUP VINCI MULTIPLEX ISG LTD BAM NUTTALL BOUYGUES
Sound familiar?

The margin killers every specialist sub knows.

M&E subcontractors typically lose 15–22% of potential profit to admin gaps, unclaimed VOs and late payment chasing. Contraq closes every one.

📅
Laggers on the wrong floor — again
Your engineers turn up to the wrong zone because the main contractor moved access, nobody told you, and the site WhatsApp is 400 messages deep. Half a day lost, and Morgan Sindall won't compensate without a written record.
Contraq Diary assigns engineers to specific zones and floors, logs access restrictions as they happen, and builds the paper trail you need to claim delay costs.
→
🧾
Payment applications going nowhere
You submitted ValApp 4 to Balfour Beatty's portal six weeks ago. You've had no pay less notice, no payment, and three different answers from their commercial team. Meanwhile 5% retention from three jobs sits unclaimed because you've lost track of the DLP dates.
Contraq tracks every payment application, logs due dates under the Construction Act, flags missing pay less notices, and chases retention release dates automatically.
→
📁
Quotes buried and spec revisions missed
Your ductwork lagging quote for the Skanska job was based on NBS Section M30 Rev B. They've issued Rev D and changed the specified thickness. You only find out on site — and now you're eating the cost because there's no variation order in writing.
Contraq links every quote to its specification revision, flags when drawings are superseded, and gives you a timestamped record to support VO claims against any main contractor.
→
📦
Knauf short-delivered and nobody told you
Three pallets of Knauf Earthwool 100mm turn up instead of five. The site supervisor signed the delivery note. Your lagger finds out on the Monday morning when he runs out mid-job, and Mace charges you for the delay. You have no PO trail to push back on Knauf.
Contraq's procurement register raises POs against each project, logs deliveries against order quantities, and flags shortfalls before they become site problems.
→
📉
VOs going uninvoiced until it's too late
The spec changed from Class O to Class 1 halfway through. You did the work, you absorbed the cost difference, you never raised a VO because there was no system to catch it. That job you thought was 22% margin finished at 11%.
Contraq's project journal logs every instruction and spec change as it happens — with one-tap VO drafting so you claim it before the job closes and the right to vary expires.
→
👷
CSCS card expired — turned away at the gate
Your best lagger gets turned away at the Vinci site gate at 7am because his Gold Card expired last Tuesday. He's been on the tools for 15 years. You lose a day's production, he loses a day's pay, and your relationship with the site manager takes another hit.
Contraq tracks every CSCS card, IPAF, asbestos awareness cert and hot works permit across your whole workforce — with 30-day and 7-day expiry warnings so you're never caught out.
→

✦ AI‑Powered Feature

Upload your quote book.
Live in 60 seconds.

Got your rates in an Excel spreadsheet or a PDF tender document? Upload it as-is (Excel / PDF / Word) and our AI reads every line item — Knauf specs, Armaflex grades, ductwork lagging rates, pipe sizes — and maps it into your live Contraq price book. No re-keying. No reformatting. Just done.

📄
Step 1
Drop your existing rates & specs
Upload your price book, a tender BoQ, or a Knauf/Rockwool spec sheet — any Excel or PDF, however messy. We handle real-world files from the real construction industry.
.XLSX .XLS .PDF
⚡
Step 2
AI reads your M&E world
The AI recognises pipe sizes, insulation grades, NBS references, client names and project values — mapping each line item to the right field in seconds. It understands M&E trade language, not just generic spreadsheet columns.
✓
Step 3
Your live project dashboard — ready
Your quotes become live tenders. Your tenders become projects. Your projects show real cost vs budget — populated with your actual jobs, not placeholder data.
↑ Projects auto-populated  ↑ Reports live
🌟
No migration headache. Ever.
Start with your real rates from day one — not a blank price book.
Most platforms make you re-enter every line item by hand. Contraq's AI reads your existing rate schedule, supplier price card or BoQ and has you quoting live jobs within a minute.
Try the demo  ›

What's inside

Every tool a specialist sub needs.
Nothing a main contractor already has.

Built from the ground up for M&E and specialist trade subcontractors — not adapted from generic accounting software. Every feature solves a real problem on real commercial sites.

Insulation · Ductwork · Pipework · Electrical · Fire stopping · Mechanical services

Win more M&E work

Quote Tier-1 tenders.
Chase them before they go cold.

Price ductwork, pipework and specialist trade jobs from your live rate book, send professional quotes directly to main contractor contacts, and track every tender from Balfour Beatty to ISG. Automatic reminders mean no submission dies through inaction.

  • ✓Quote builder with NBS section references and material grades
  • ✓Tender register — track status on every Tier-1 submission
  • ✓Auto chase reminders before decision dates pass
  • ✓Win rate analytics by main contractor and spec type

Built for the trade

If you quote from specs, chase applications, and track operatives — this is yours.

CONTRAQ is purpose-built for M&E and specialist trade subcontractors — from two-person outfits to multi-site teams. If you lose time to spreadsheets, lose money to missed variations, and lose sleep over payment applications, we built this for you.

Sound familiar?
✓ You're an M&E or specialist trade subcontractor — insulation, ductwork, pipework, electrical, plumbing, fire stopping, drylining, or similar.
✓ You quote from PDF specs and tender packs — and you know how long it takes to price a 60-page schedule in Excel.
✓ You submit payment applications to a main contractor and wait 30–60 days to get paid — sometimes longer.
✓ You've done extra work on site without written instruction and struggled to recover the cost.
✓ Your quoting, invoicing, and cert tracking currently lives in spreadsheets, email inboxes, and WhatsApp groups.
✓ You know you're leaving money on the table — unclaimed VOs, late chasing, expired certs, retention you forgot about.
Works best for
→ M&E subcontractors with 2+ operatives on commercial projects
→ Teams quoting from specs and chasing payment applications
→ Firms that know they're losing money but can't pinpoint where

If you nodded at three or more — CONTRAQ was designed around your exact problems.

14-day free trial · No card required · From £49/mo

What’s live. What’s next.

CONTRAQ is in active development. We believe in telling you exactly what works today versus what’s on the roadmap. No ambiguity.

● Live now

Professional · £149/mo
How we calculated this
[1] VO leakage 3–8% — Conservative: RICS Contracts in Use Survey 2022, lower-quartile variation rate on subcontracts under £500k. Optimistic: Arcadis UK Market View 2023, average unresolved VO value on M&E packages.
[2] Admin reduction 25–45% — McKinsey “Reinventing Construction” 2020, digitisation productivity gains for document-heavy subcontractor workflows (lower and upper bounds).
[3] Retention non-recovery 1–3% — Conservative: Pye Tait / BEIS “Retentions in the Construction Industry” 2017, partial non-recovery rate. Optimistic: Build UK survey 2022, full non-recovery on insolvency-affected contracts.
[4] Admin cost £30/hr — ONS ASHE 2023, median hourly rate for construction admin/commercial roles (SOC 4163), grossed up 18% for employer NI and pension contributions.
These are modelled estimates based on published industry data, not measured results from CONTRAQ users. Your actual savings will depend on your business, how you use the platform, and your existing processes.

Questions about value

Not tech support — the commercial questions you actually want answered before you commit.

I only have 2 engineers. Is there a plan for smaller firms?+
That's exactly what Starter is for. At £49/month it covers 2 users, 5 active projects, and 3 AI quotes per month — enough to run your operation and see the value before scaling up. Most Starter users upgrade to Professional within 8 weeks once they see what CONTRAQ catches on real projects.
How quickly will I see a return on £149/month?+
The platform is designed so that a single chased invoice that comes in 10 days sooner, one VO you document properly instead of writing off, or one retention release you track to its DLP date could each cover several months of subscription. We are collecting real ROI data from founding members and will publish verified figures once we have them.
We only run 3–4 projects at a time. Is £149/month worth it?+
Project count isn't the driver — it's what falls through the cracks on each one. If you're chasing even one late payment per month, missing a single VO claim per quarter, or spending Sunday nights updating cert spreadsheets, the platform pays for itself many times over. If you want to test the water first, start on Starter at £49/month with up to 5 projects.
What does the AI actually do on the Professional tier?+
Two things. First, the AI Quote Builder reads a PDF enquiry pack — NBS specs, scope schedules, drawing registers — and extracts line items, quantities, and scope references into a structured quote you can price from your rate book. Second, the Site Journal's AI analyses your diary entries against JCT and NEC notice requirements, flagging when you may have grounds for an extension of time or compensation event. Both save hours and catch money you'd otherwise miss.
We're a team of 12. Do we need Business or will Professional work?+
Professional includes 5 user accounts — enough for most M&E firms with a QS, a project manager, and key site leads. If you need more than 5 logins, a dedicated account manager, SSO, Procore integration, or multi-company reporting, Business is the right tier. You can also start on Professional and move up — we'll credit any remaining time pro-rata.
What happens to my data if I cancel?+
Your data stays accessible in read-only mode for 90 days after cancellation. You can export everything — projects, quotes, invoices, documents — as CSV and PDF at any point during that window. After 90 days, data is permanently deleted in line with UK GDPR. We never hold your data hostage and there are no exit fees on any tier.
Limited availability

Founding member pricing is limited to 20 places.

Every founding member locks in today's rate for life — even when we raise prices. You also get direct access to the product team and first priority on every new feature we ship. We're building CONTRAQ with the trade, not behind a desk.

Privacy Policy Terms of Service Security & GDPR Cookie Settings Contact
Contraq is developed in partnership with the UK M&E and specialist trade sector. Contraq Ltd is registered in England & Wales. All prices shown exclude VAT.
CONTRAQ
🔒

Your business data is safe with Contraq

We hold your data to the same standard we'd expect if someone else held ours. Transparent practices, UK infrastructure, and no surprises.

✓ GDPR Compliant ✓ TLS 1.3 Encrypted ✓ Stripe Payments 🇬🇧 UK Data Storage
🇬🇧
Data Storage — UK Servers
Your data is stored exclusively on UK and EU-based infrastructure using Supabase (Postgres database) and Vercel (application hosting), both of which maintain data residency within the European Economic Area.

We do not store any data on servers located outside the UK or EU, and we will never transfer your data to jurisdictions without adequate data protection laws. Supabase · Vercel · AWS EU-West
🔐
Encryption — In Transit & At Rest
All data transmitted between your browser and our servers is encrypted using TLS 1.3 — the latest and most secure transport layer protocol. We enforce HTTPS on all connections and reject legacy protocols.

Data stored in our database is encrypted at rest using AES-256 encryption. Database backups are also encrypted before being written to storage. TLS 1.3 in transit · AES-256 at rest
🔑
Access Control & Audit Logs
Access to your company data is governed by role-based access control (RBAC). Admins can assign permissions per team member — view only, edit, or full admin.

Every significant action (invoice raised, project edited, engineer record changed) is written to an immutable audit log — timestamped, attributed to a named user, and retained for 12 months. RBAC · Immutable audit trail
💾
Backups & Recovery
Production infrastructure will include automated daily backups with point-in-time recovery and geo-redundant storage. Backup and recovery specifications will be published at launch.

In the event of a serious incident, our Recovery Time Objective (RTO) is under 4 hours and Recovery Point Objective (RPO) is under 24 hours. Daily backups · 30-day retention · Multi-region
⚖️
GDPR & Your Rights
Contraq acts as a data processor on your behalf. You remain the data controller for all information relating to your employees, clients and subcontractors.

We honour all data subject rights under UK GDPR: right to access, rectification, erasure, portability and restriction. Submit a request to [email protected] and we will respond within 30 days.

A full Data Processor Agreement (DPA) is available on request. UK GDPR · ICO registered · DPA available
💳
Payment Security — Stripe
All subscription payments are processed by Stripe, a PCI DSS Level 1 certified payment processor. Contraq never stores, transmits or has access to your card details — they are handled entirely by Stripe's infrastructure.

Stripe is used by millions of businesses worldwide including Amazon, Google and Deliveroo. Their security practices exceed the requirements of PCI DSS and ISO 27001. PCI DSS Level 1 · No card data stored by Contraq
⏳
ISO 27001 Certification — In Progress
We are currently working through the ISO 27001 information security management certification process with our accredited auditor. We expect to receive certification in Q3 2025. In the meantime, our security practices already meet or exceed the ISO 27001 standard in all material respects.
🔍 Responsible Disclosure
If you discover a security vulnerability in Contraq, please report it responsibly to [email protected]. We commit to acknowledging your report within 48 hours and resolving confirmed vulnerabilities within 30 days. We do not take legal action against good-faith security researchers.
📄 Request a Data Processor Agreement

If your business requires a formal Data Processor Agreement (DPA) for compliance purposes — for example to satisfy your own ISO 27001 audit or client requirements — we can provide one. Click below to email our DPO with a pre-filled request.

⚠️ AI-Generated Estimate — Requires Human Verification
Quantities, dimensions, and specifications below are AI-generated estimates based on drawing analysis and industry reference data including BSRIA BG 85/87, BS 5422, NBS, CIBSE, and NRM2 conventions. They are not a substitute for professional quantity surveying. All values must be independently verified before use in commercial tenders.
📚 Knowledge Base v · · sources
🔍

Review & Confirm

The AI has extracted 11 line items from your documents. Items with a green dot were extracted directly from drawings with high confidence. Amber items use partially estimated values from BSRIA/BS defaults. Red items need manual verification against the source documents. Expand the 📋 assumptions panel on any item to see exactly which reference data was applied.

⚖️ Commercial Use Notice
CONTRAQ AI outputs are decision-support tools, not professional quantity surveying. References to British Standards (BS 5422, BSRIA BG 85/87), NRM2 measurement rules, and NBS specifications indicate the reference data used — not certification of compliance. Actual project specifications may differ from defaults applied. You accept sole responsibility for verifying all AI-generated values before use in tenders, contracts, or procurement. See Terms of Service for full liability limitations.

Declaration of Conformity

🍪 We use cookies
We use essential cookies to keep you logged in and optional analytics cookies to help improve the product. Learn more in our Privacy Policy.
Manage cookie preferences
Choose which cookies Contraq can use. Essential cookies are always required.
Essential cookies
Required for login, security and core platform functionality. Cannot be disabled.
Analytics cookies
Help us understand how people use Contraq so we can improve it. No personal data is shared with third parties.
Functional cookies
Remember your preferences such as dashboard layout, theme and notification settings.
Your preferences are stored locally in your browser. Contraq will not fire any analytics until you have given consent. You can change these settings at any time via the footer.
